title: BilibiliSanLian
description:
Put your bilibili‘s sanlian in your Minecraft World!
将哔哩哔哩的三连放入你的我的世界世界中！
body:
### BilibiliSanlian

将哔哩哔哩的三连放入了我的世界，使用 "/item replace entity {玩家名} armor.head from entity {玩家名} container.{物品栏物品序号}"命令 将末影水晶放入头部

Put Bilibili's triple into my world, use "/item replace entity {player name} armor.head from entity {player name} container.{inventory item serial number}"command tp put the ender crystal into the head
